notes: Cross-service / shared-library culprit. The failing service is inventoryservice, but the causal diff is in the SHARED db client library pkg/db/pool.go (commit c7d2e9a3, author carlos.mendez, platform team), which lowers the shared defaultMaxConns 50->10. That ceiling is inherited by inventoryservice because it does not override MaxConns; the inventory deploy at 13:42 rebuilt against the new shared default, so db_pool_max_conns drops 50->10 at 13:42 and db_pool_in_use saturates at 10 by 13:50 (delayed onset ~8 min as the pool fills under load). The TEMPTING WRONG answer is 1a6f4b9c (ivan.petrov, services/inventory/db/pool.go + config/db.yaml) which lands at 13:18 on the failing service and looks pool-related, but its diff only raises MaxConnIdleTime and HealthCheckPeriod -- it never touches the max-conns ceiling, so it cannot saturate the pool. Other decoys: 6e19c5ce (go.mod pgx patch bump), and the shipping(ba9484ce)+order(76005bb9) deploys near onset are downstream/unrelated. flags.json (inventory_read_replica_routing) is a distractor.
